name: citations-grounded-turn
description: When the server's knowledge base is seeded and a turn is grounded on it, the eventual_response must carry data.data.citations with the source(s) that grounded the answer (the engine's retrieval mirror). Rust/TS/C# do this; Go + Python must reach parity. Asserts the deterministic citation fields (id/title/snippet), not the computed score. Canonical order verified against the Rust reference.

knowledge.content: SmooAI returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.

assert.data.data.citations.0.title: returns.md
assert.data.data.citations.0.snippet: SmooAI returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.
